Reasoning: The current visit record primarily details diagnoses and procedures related to cardiovascular issues (Coronary atherosclerosis, Atrial fibrillation, Congestive heart failure, Asthma, Iatrogenic pulmonary embolism, Hemorrhage) and hyposmolality/hyponatremia. There is no explicit mention of hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid disorder diagnosis or ongoing management related to lipid metabolism in the provided record. Therefore, based strictly on the evidence provided, there is no strong and explicit basis to predict that a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the next hospital visit.
